zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Gauthier Giffard De Boldebec於1032年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利隆維爾-素-希時，他的父親Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill22歲，母親Ermengarde Flaitel18歲。他於大約1080年與Agnes de Ribemont結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1102年7月15日在英國英格蘭哈普爾努特利享年70歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯隆維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Gauthier Giffard De Boldebec于1032年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利隆維爾-素-希时，他的父亲Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill22岁，母亲Ermengarde Flaitel18岁。他于大约1080年与Agnes de Ribemont结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1102年7月15日在英国英格兰哈普爾努特利享年70岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯隆維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Giffard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: (i) relationship name from the Continental Germanic personal name Gifard. (ii) nickname, perhaps sometimes from Old French giffard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Guiver
meanings: English: (i) nickname, apparently from Middle English giver ‘giver, donor, bestower’. (ii) variant of Giffard with voicing of /f/ to /v/ and loss of final -d.

variants.name: Gafford
meanings: English (southeastern): assimilated form of Gatford, a name of various origins. In Sussex and Surrey it is perhaps a variant of the habitational name Catford from a place so called in Somerset. Gatford is also from the habitational names Gateford (in Worksop, Nottinghamshire) or Gateforth (near Selby, Yorkshire), both formed with Old English gāt ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’, influenced by Old Norse geit ‘goat’.

Probably also an altered form of German Gaffert: habitational name from Gaffert near Köslin, Brandenburg, or from a personal name formed with Middle High German gate ‘fellow, companion’. The surname Gaffert is very rare in Germany.

English: perhaps an altered form of Gatewood , an occupational name for a ‘goatherd’ (Middle English gate-werde, Old English gātweard) or for a ‘gate keeper’ (Middle English gateward, Old English ʒeatweard, dialect gātward).

variants.name: Gifford
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

nameMeanings.name: Gauthier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Gauthier Giffard De Boldebec was born in 1032, in Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill, was 22 and his mother, Ermengarde Flaitel, was 18. He married Agnes de Ribemont about 1080. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 15 July 1102, in Nutley, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Longueville, Calvados, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Gauthier Giffard De Boldebec est né en 1032, à Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde Flaitel, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Ribemont environ 1080. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 15 juillet 1102, à Nutley, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Longueville, Calvados, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Gauthier Giffard De Boldebec 1032 in Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill 22 und seine Mutter Ermengarde Flaitel 18. Er hat um 1080 Agnes de Ribemont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Juli 1102 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Nutley, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Longueville, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Gauthier Giffard De Boldebec è nato il nel 1032 nel Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Ermengarde Flaitel, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Ribemont circa 1080. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 luglio 1102, nel Nutley, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Longueville, Calvados, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Gauthier Giffard De Boldebecが1032年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロングエヴィレ-スル-スシで生まれた時，父Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevillは22歳，母Ermengarde Flaitelは18歳であった。約1080年にAgnes de Ribemontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1102年7月15日にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアヌトリーで70歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディカルヴァドスロングエヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Gauthier Giffard De Boldebec(이)가 1032년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 론구에비레-수-스시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermengarde Flaitel(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1080년 Agnes de Ribemont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1102년 7월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 누틀리에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 론구에빌에 묻혔다.

mn.Nutley, Hampshire, England, Royaume-Uni: Nutley, Hāmtūnscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Gauthier Giffard De Boldebec nasceu em 1032, em Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde Flaitel, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Ribemont aproximadamente 1080. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de julho de 1102, em Nutley, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Longueville, Calvados, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Gauthier Giffard De Boldebec родился в 1032 г. в местности лонгуевилле-сур-сси, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde Flaitel, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Ribemont около 1080 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 15 июля 1102 г. в местности нутли, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности лонгуевилл, калвадос, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Gauthier Giffard De Boldebec nació en 1032, en Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Ermengarde Flaitel, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Agnes de Ribemont aproximadamente 1080. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de julio de 1102, en Nutley, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Longueville, Calvados, Normandie, Francia.
